title: Top 5 Claude Cowork Tips I Wish I Knew from Day One
summary: Jeff Su presents five operational best practices for Claude Cowork based on three months of running a business with the platform. The tips address keeping root files lean, structuring memory properly, archiving outdated content, migrating projects into workstations, and distinguishing when to use skills versus workstations.
